source_description: Add an `enum` field-type plugin (EnumItem) that stores PHP backed-enum values via their backing scalar, validates against the declared enum class, emits JSON Schema `enum` for ai-schema, and surfaces case labels in admin widgets. Refactor FieldTypeInferrer to map backed enums to `enum` and remove the transitional `string + settings.enum_class` bridge documented in entity-system.md (Known Transitional Gaps).
